jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Plum - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Plum! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Plum:
Plum is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Plum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
